title: System Design & Architecture
tagline: Design systems that scale, survive and evolve
description: A complete path through System Design & Software Architecture as of June 2026: software architecture foundations, the system design process, capacity estimation, performance/scalability/reliability fundamentals, communication and API design, storage and database architecture, caching and CDN, messaging and event-driven communication, distributed systems theory and algorithms, architectural styles, microservices, event-driven architecture with event sourcing and CQRS, Domain-Driven Design, clean/hexagonal/onion architecture, software and enterprise integration patterns, resilience and fault tolerance, security and zero-trust architecture, observability architecture, multi-region and edge architecture, frontend/backend/data/AI-ML system design, real-time and specialized architectures, system-design interview case studies, architecture documentation (C4, arc42, ADRs), governance, evolutionary architecture, frontier trends and the software architect's career. Tool-specific topics (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD tools, IaC tools, individual cloud services, language stacks, AI agents, databases) live in their dedicated subjects.
